text:
ChatGPT Images 2.0 is helping people and businesses unlock new ways to create and build.

Compared to just a few weeks ago, we've seen a more than 50% increase in image usage. Nearly 60% of daily users are newly logged-in users.

Like our users, we just keep building, and we're

text:
Mother's Day is in a week, and our data makes one thing clear: women are doing it all.

More than 50% of regular ChatGPT users are females (based on people with typically feminine first names, according to our anonymized data) — and millions are turning to ChatGPT to build
media: image: ChatGPT usage around recipes, child symptoms, family logistics, care, and dinner
notes: Consumer usage-data post. Treat demographic inference as anonymized-name-based and cautious.

text:
Codex has changed how you interact with our models, and, despite what you may have thought, you don't need any technical understanding or developer background to use it.

In fact, if you've used ChatGPT, you should use Codex. It's not only a powerful tool for daily tasks,
media: quoted_video: OpenAI everyday work with Codex
notes: Newsroom reframes Codex as a general ChatGPT-user tool, not just developer workflow.

text:
The future of AI is being built right now in places like Abilene, Texas.

Our Stargate site there offers a look at what America can build — massive compute capacity, skilled trade jobs, local investment, and responsible infrastructure at scale.
media: link_card: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
notes: Corporate infrastructure narrative links AI capability to U.S. compute buildout and local economic impact.

text: The official newsroom for @OpenAI. openai.com/news. Joined 2024-06. 3 following. 146,000 followers. 124 posts.
notes: Profile anchors the account as official OpenAI source for corporate/product newsroom posts.
